results.title: Hogwarts Legacy 2: Reveal could be just around the corner
results.description: Current rumors suggest that Hogwarts Legacy 2 could be announced at the upcoming State of Play – possibly as early as early June. On Reddit, however, the claim remains controversial.

results.title: Cannes Best Actress Tao Okamoto Finds Her Breakthrough Role
results.description: Before her Cannes win, Tao Okamoto was better known abroad than in Japan. Hamaguchi explains why she was perfect for his film. The post Cannes Best Actress Tao Okamoto Finds Her Breakthrough Role first appeared on JAPAN Forward .

results.title: Martin Scorsese's actress daughter slams 'ugly and fat' comments after landing huge TV role
results.description: Martin Scorsese's actress daughter Francesca hit back at trolls who called her "ugly and fat" after landing a role in season 2 of Prime Video's Mr. & Mrs. Smith
